mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `merchant` (operation_type, merchant_name, contact_phone, email, card_name, card_no, card_mobile, card_begin_date, card_end_date, credentials_type, store_name, store_province, store_city, store_county, store_addr, business_name, business_no, main_type, legal_person, business_province, business_city, business_county, business_addr, business_begin_date, business_end_date, acc_type, acc_card_no, acc_mobile, acc_name, bank, bank_name, bank_link_no, bank_branch, province, city, parent_channel_merchant_no, legal_licence_front_url, legal_licence_front_url_local, legal_licence_back_url, legal_licence_back_url_local, licence_url, open_account_licence_url, open_account_licence_url_local, licence_url_local, settle_type, login_account, merchant_no, request_no, application_no, application_status, audit_opinion, sign_url, status, user_id, create_time, update_time, delete_time) VALUES (#{data.operationType}, #{data.merchantName}, #{data.contactPhone}, #{data.email}, #{data.cardName}, #{data.cardNo}, #{data.cardMobile}, #{data.cardBeginDate}, #{data.cardEndDate}, #{data.credentialsType}, #{data.storeName}, #{data.storeProvince}, #{data.storeCity}, #{data.storeCounty}, #{data.storeAddr}, #{data.businessName}, #{data.businessNo}, #{data.mainType}, #{data.legalPerson}, #{data.businessProvince}, #{data.businessCity}, #{data.businessCounty}, #{data.businessAddr}, #{data.businessBeginDate}, #{data.businessEndDate}, #{data.accType}, #{data.accCardNo}, #{data.accMobile}, #{data.accName}, #{data.bank}, #{data.bankName}, #{data.bankLinkNo}, #{data.bankBranch}, #{data.province}, #{data.city}, #{data.parentChannelMerchantNo}, #{data.legalLicenceFrontUrl}, #{data.legalLicenceFrontUrlLocal}, #{data.legalLicenceBackUrl}, #{data.legalLicenceBackUrlLocal}, #{data.licenceUrl}, #{data.openAccountLicenceUrl}, #{data.openAccountLicenceUrlLocal}, #{data.licenceUrlLocal}, #{data.settleType}, #{data.loginAccount}, #{data.merchantNo}, #{data.requestNo}, #{data.applicationNo}, #{data.applicationStatus}, #{data.auditOpinion}, #{data.signUrl}, #{data.status}, #{data.userId}, #{data.createTime}, #{data.updateTime}, #{data.deleteTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE `merchant`
operation_type = #{data.operationType},
merchant_name = #{data.merchantName}, contact_phone = #{data.contactPhone}, email = #{data.email}, card_name = #{data.cardName}, card_no = #{data.cardNo}, card_mobile = #{data.cardMobile}, card_begin_date = #{data.cardBeginDate},
card_end_date = #{data.cardEndDate}, credentials_type = #{data.credentialsType},
store_name = #{data.storeName}, store_province = #{data.storeProvince},
store_city = #{data.storeCity}, store_county = #{data.storeCounty}, store_addr = #{data.storeAddr},
business_name = #{data.businessName}, business_no = #{data.businessNo}, main_type = #{data.mainType}, legal_person = #{data.legalPerson}, business_province = #{data.businessProvince},
business_city = #{data.businessCity}, business_county = #{data.businessCounty},
business_addr = #{data.businessAddr}, business_begin_date = #{data.businessBeginDate},
business_end_date = #{data.businessEndDate},
acc_type = #{data.accType}, acc_card_no = #{data.accCardNo}, acc_mobile = #{data.accMobile}, acc_name = #{data.accName}, bank = #{data.bank}, bank_name = #{data.bankName}, bank_link_no = #{data.bankLinkNo}, bank_branch = #{data.bankBranch}, province = #{data.province}, city = #{data.city},
parent_channel_merchant_no = #{data.parentChannelMerchantNo},
legal_licence_front_url = #{data.legalLicenceFrontUrl},
legal_licence_front_url_local = #{data.legalLicenceFrontUrlLocal},
legal_licence_back_url = #{data.legalLicenceBackUrl},
legal_licence_back_url_local = #{data.legalLicenceBackUrlLocal},
licence_url = #{data.licenceUrl}, open_account_licence_url = #{data.openAccountLicenceUrl},
open_account_licence_url_local = #{data.openAccountLicenceUrlLocal},
licence_url_local = #{data.licenceUrlLocal},
settle_type = #{data.settleType}, login_account = #{data.loginAccount}, merchant_no = #{data.merchantNo}, request_no = #{data.requestNo}, application_no = #{data.applicationNo},
application_status = #{data.applicationStatus},
audit_opinion = #{data.auditOpinion}, sign_url = #{data.signUrl}, status = #{data.status}, update_time = #{data.updateTime}, delete_time = #{data.deleteTime},
WHERE id = #{data.id}

UPDATE `merchant`
operation_type = #{data.operationType},
merchant_name = #{data.merchantName}, contact_phone = #{data.contactPhone}, email = #{data.email}, card_name = #{data.cardName}, card_no = #{data.cardNo}, card_mobile = #{data.cardMobile}, card_begin_date = #{data.cardBeginDate},
card_end_date = #{data.cardEndDate}, credentials_type = #{data.credentialsType},
store_name = #{data.storeName}, store_province = #{data.storeProvince},
store_city = #{data.storeCity}, store_county = #{data.storeCounty}, store_addr = #{data.storeAddr},
business_name = #{data.businessName}, business_no = #{data.businessNo}, main_type = #{data.mainType}, legal_person = #{data.legalPerson}, business_province = #{data.businessProvince},
business_city = #{data.businessCity}, business_county = #{data.businessCounty},
business_addr = #{data.businessAddr}, business_begin_date = #{data.businessBeginDate},
business_end_date = #{data.businessEndDate},
acc_type = #{data.accType}, acc_card_no = #{data.accCardNo}, acc_mobile = #{data.accMobile}, acc_name = #{data.accName}, bank = #{data.bank}, bank_name = #{data.bankName}, bank_link_no = #{data.bankLinkNo}, bank_branch = #{data.bankBranch}, province = #{data.province}, city = #{data.city},
parent_channel_merchant_no = #{data.parentChannelMerchantNo},
legal_licence_front_url = #{data.legalLicenceFrontUrl},
legal_licence_front_url_local = #{data.legalLicenceFrontUrlLocal},
legal_licence_back_url = #{data.legalLicenceBackUrl},
legal_licence_back_url_local = #{data.legalLicenceBackUrlLocal},
licence_url = #{data.licenceUrl}, open_account_licence_url = #{data.openAccountLicenceUrl},
open_account_licence_url_local = #{data.openAccountLicenceUrlLocal},
licence_url_local = #{data.licenceUrlLocal},
settle_type = #{data.settleType}, login_account = #{data.loginAccount},
request_no = #{data.requestNo}, application_no = #{data.applicationNo},
application_status = #{data.applicationStatus},
audit_opinion = #{data.auditOpinion}, sign_url = #{data.signUrl}, status = #{data.status}, update_time = #{data.updateTime}, delete_time = #{data.deleteTime},
WHERE merchant_no = #{data.merchantNo}
